title: Almanach — SceneryStack Knowledge Base
description: A file-based wiki of SceneryStack knowledge: API guides, software patterns, styling, and accessibility conventions for building interactive simulations. Every page is plain Markdown with structured frontmatter.

documents.title: What is SceneryStack?
documents.description: Overview of the SceneryStack framework, its constituent libraries, and how to install and import it.

documents.title: ModelViewTransform2
documents.description: Mapping between model coordinates (physical units, y-up) and view coordinates (pixels, y-down) with ModelViewTransform2.

documents.title: Drag Listeners
documents.description: Making nodes draggable with DragListener, KeyboardDragListener, and RichDragListener, wired to a model positionProperty through a transform.

documents.title: Model-View Separation
documents.description: The foundational SceneryStack architecture - axon Properties form the model, scenery Nodes observe it, and nothing flows the other way.

documents.title: Color Profiles
documents.description: Centralizing colors with ProfileColorProperty so an application can switch between default and projector color schemes at runtime.

documents.title: The Parallel DOM (PDOM)
documents.description: How scenery renders an invisible, semantic HTML tree alongside the canvas so screen readers and keyboards can use the application.

documents.title: Authoring Guide
documents.description: Conventions for adding documents to this wiki - folder taxonomy, required frontmatter schema, and how the generated indexes work.
